company.segment_en: Data Center — the accelerated-compute platform that sets the price of AI silicon, and TSMC's anchor customer
company.segment_zh: 資料中心 — 替 AI 矽定價的加速運算平台，也是台積電的頭號客戶
company.blurb_en: How NVIDIA actually raises the realized price of compute, what you can watch it with, how much it makes from AI, and how ~100% of it rests on TSMC leading-edge silicon and CoWoS — the purest read on TSMC's single largest customer.
company.blurb_zh: NVIDIA 究竟怎麼提高已實現算力售價、能用什麼資料觀察、從 AI 賺到多少，以及這一切如何幾乎 100% 押在台積電先進製程與 CoWoS 上 — 對台積電最大單一客戶最純粹的判讀。

thesis_en: NVIDIA is the purest pricing-power story in AI compute — and TSMC's anchor customer. Raw FLOPs keep getting cheaper, yet NVIDIA's REALIZED price per unit of useful compute keeps rising: every generation (Hopper → Blackwell → Rubin) steps ASP up, it now sells $3M+ rack-scale systems instead of $30k chips, and CUDA locks the buyer in. Nearly 100% of that silicon is fabbed by TSMC on N4/N3 with CoWoS — so both NVIDIA's AI benefit and its binding constraint live inside TSMC's leading-edge and CoWoS capacity.
thesis_zh: NVIDIA 是 AI 算力中最純粹的定價權故事 — 也是台積電的頭號客戶。原始 FLOPs 年年變便宜，但 NVIDIA 每單位「有用算力」的已實現售價持續上升：每一個世代（Hopper → Blackwell → Rubin）都把 ASP 往上推，現在賣的是 300 萬美元以上的機櫃級整機而非 3 萬美元的單顆晶片，而 CUDA 把客戶牢牢鎖住。這些矽幾乎 100% 由台積電以 N4/N3 製造、用 CoWoS 封裝 — 因此 NVIDIA 的 AI 利益與它的綁定約束，都住在台積電的先進製程與 CoWoS 產能裡。

headline.verdict_zh: RAISING — 已實現算力售價擴張

pricing.verdict_zh: RAISING — 已實現算力售價擴張

levers.name_zh: 世代 ASP 階梯（Hopper → Blackwell → Rubin）
levers.mechanism_en: Each new architecture is priced well above the one it replaces while delivering more performance/Watt. The annual cadence resets the price ceiling every year — a GB200 commands a large premium over H100, and Rubin will reset it again. Realized $/useful-FLOP rises despite raw-FLOP deflation.
levers.mechanism_zh: 每一個新架構的定價都遠高於它取代的上一代，同時提供更高的效能/瓦。年度節奏每年重置價格天花板 — GB200 對 H100 收取大幅溢價，Rubin 會再重置一次。即使原始 FLOP 通縮，已實現每有效 FLOP 售價仍上升。
levers.observability_en: Data Center ASP trend in 10-Q revenue ÷ units, GTC product pricing, analyst accelerator models (SemiAnalysis).
levers.observability_zh: 10-Q 資料中心營收 ÷ 出貨量的 ASP 趨勢、GTC 產品定價、分析師加速器模型（SemiAnalysis）。
levers.source_en: NVIDIA GTC keynotes; NVIDIA 10-Q Data Center segment
levers.source_zh: NVIDIA GTC 主題演講；NVIDIA 10-Q 資料中心分部

levers.name_en: Rack-scale system selling (GB200 NVL72 / DGX), not chips
levers.name_zh: 機櫃級整機銷售（GB200 NVL72／DGX），而非單顆晶片
levers.mechanism_en: NVIDIA increasingly sells integrated rack systems (NVL72) and DGX/HGX platforms rather than bare GPUs. The unit of sale jumps from a ~$30-40k chip to a ~$3M+ rack, pulling NVLink, NVSwitch, trays and software into one ASP — a step-change in realized price per deployed unit.
levers.mechanism_zh: NVIDIA 越來越多賣的是整合機櫃系統（NVL72）與 DGX/HGX 平台，而非裸 GPU。銷售單位從約 3-4 萬美元的晶片，跳升到約 300 萬美元以上的機櫃，把 NVLink、NVSwitch、托盤與軟體一起納入單一 ASP — 每部署單位的已實現售價出現階躍。
levers.observability_en: System vs component revenue mix in earnings commentary; NVL72 / DGX shipment disclosures; ODM (Foxconn/Quanta) order flow.
levers.observability_zh: 法說中系統 vs 元件營收結構；NVL72／DGX 出貨揭露；ODM（鴻海/廣達）接單流。
levers.source_en: NVIDIA earnings calls; ODM order reporting
levers.source_zh: NVIDIA 法說會；ODM 接單報導

levers.mechanism_en: Two decades of CUDA, cuDNN, TensorRT, NIM microservices and a trained developer base make switching costly. Low price elasticity lets NVIDIA hold and raise price where a fungible-silicon vendor could not — the moat that underwrites every other lever.
levers.mechanism_zh: 二十年的 CUDA、cuDNN、TensorRT、NIM 微服務與龐大的開發者基礎，讓轉換成本高昂。低價格彈性讓 NVIDIA 能在可替代矽供應商辦不到的情況下守住並提高價格 — 這是支撐其他所有槓桿的護城河。
levers.observability_en: Gross-margin durability across cycles; developer/CUDA download counts; share retention vs custom ASICs.
levers.observability_zh: 跨循環的毛利率韌性；開發者/CUDA 下載量；相對自研 ASIC 的市占保持。
levers.source_en: NVIDIA gross-margin trend; developer ecosystem disclosures
levers.source_zh: NVIDIA 毛利率趨勢；開發者生態揭露

levers.name_zh: 稀缺／配額溢價（供給受限）
levers.mechanism_en: Demand has run far ahead of CoWoS and HBM supply, so NVIDIA allocates rather than discounts. Constrained supply holds ASP firm and lets the newest, highest-priced parts clear first — realized price tracks supply tightness, not a falling rate card.
levers.mechanism_zh: 需求遠遠超前 CoWoS 與 HBM 供給，因此 NVIDIA 用配額而非折讓。受限供給撐住 ASP，並讓最新、最高價的產品優先出清 — 已實現價格跟著供給鬆緊走，而非下滑的牌價表。
levers.observability_en: CoWoS / HBM lead times, GPU spot rents (vast.ai / market), NVIDIA 'supply-constrained' guidance language.
levers.observability_zh: CoWoS／HBM 交期、GPU 現貨租金（vast.ai／市場）、NVIDIA「供給受限」的指引措辭。
levers.source_en: TSMC CoWoS commentary; third-party GPU price trackers
levers.source_zh: 台積電 CoWoS 評論；第三方 GPU 價格追蹤

levers.mechanism_en: Bigger clusters drag along NVLink/NVSwitch, Quantum InfiniBand, Spectrum-X Ethernet and BlueField DPUs (post-Mellanox). Networking scales with cluster size and bills separately, raising the total realized price of an AI deployment above the accelerator line alone.
levers.mechanism_zh: 更大的叢集會帶出 NVLink/NVSwitch、Quantum InfiniBand、Spectrum-X 乙太網路與 BlueField DPU（併購 Mellanox 後）。網路隨叢集規模放大、另計費，把一次 AI 部署的總已實現售價推高到加速器項目之上。
levers.observability_en: Networking revenue line in 10-Q; InfiniBand vs Ethernet mix; attach rate per GPU cluster.
levers.observability_zh: 10-Q 的網路營收項；InfiniBand vs 乙太網路結構；每 GPU 叢集的 attach 率。

levers.name_en: Software & recurring (AI Enterprise / DGX Cloud / Omniverse)
levers.name_zh: 軟體與週期性收入（AI Enterprise／DGX Cloud／Omniverse）
levers.mechanism_en: Per-GPU AI Enterprise subscriptions, DGX Cloud and Omniverse layer a value-based, recurring revenue stream on top of the silicon — a software margin that lifts blended realized price and is independent of any per-chip rate card.
levers.mechanism_zh: 每 GPU 的 AI Enterprise 訂閱、DGX Cloud 與 Omniverse，在矽之上疊加一層價值定向、週期性的營收流 — 一種軟體利差，拉高混合後的已實現售價，且不受任何每晶片牌價牽制。
levers.observability_en: Software & services run-rate disclosures; AI Enterprise per-GPU pricing; DGX Cloud commitments.
levers.observability_zh: 軟體與服務年化揭露；AI Enterprise 每 GPU 定價；DGX Cloud 承諾。

pricing.engine_note_en: generational ASP step-ups (Hopper→Blackwell→Rubin), rack-scale system selling and CUDA lock-in are doing the work — NVIDIA is a price-maker, not a price-taker
pricing.engine_note_zh: 世代 ASP 階梯（Hopper→Blackwell→Rubin）、機櫃級整機銷售與 CUDA 鎖定在推動 — NVIDIA 是定價者而非價格接受者

items.what_en: Data Center revenue, gross & operating margin, networking line, inventory & purchase commitments — the hard floor for the benefit estimate.
items.what_zh: 資料中心營收、毛利與營益率、網路項、存貨與採購承諾 — 利益估計的硬底。

items.name_zh: NVIDIA 法說會與投資人簡報
items.what_en: Management framing of Blackwell/Rubin ramp, supply constraints, system vs component mix, and software run-rate.
items.what_zh: 管理層對 Blackwell/Rubin 量產、供給限制、系統 vs 元件結構與軟體年化的措辭。

items.name_zh: 雲端巨頭 capex 指引（微軟/Google/Meta/Amazon）
items.what_en: The demand that leads NVIDIA Data Center revenue by a quarter or two — the single best forward indicator.
items.what_zh: 領先 NVIDIA 資料中心營收約一兩季的需求 — 最佳的前瞻指標。

items.what_en: Independent ASP, BOM and shipment estimates per accelerator — the cross-check on realized price and unit economics.
items.what_zh: 各加速器獨立的 ASP、BOM 與出貨估計 — 對已實現價格與單位經濟的交叉驗證。

items.what_en: Market GPU rental rates — a real-time proxy for accelerator scarcity that leads the allocation premium.
items.what_zh: 市場 GPU 租金 — 加速器稀缺的即時 proxy，領先配額溢價。

items.name_zh: 台積電營收與 CoWoS 產能揭露
items.what_en: Leading-edge (N4/N3) mix and CoWoS capacity — the supply ceiling that caps NVIDIA's shippable units.
items.what_zh: 先進製程（N4/N3）結構與 CoWoS 產能 — 限制 NVIDIA 可出貨量的供給天花板。

items.name_zh: HBM 供給（SK 海力士／美光／三星）
items.what_en: HBM3E/HBM4 capacity and qualification — the other binding input alongside CoWoS for every Blackwell/Rubin GPU.
items.what_zh: HBM3E/HBM4 產能與驗證 — 與 CoWoS 並列、每顆 Blackwell/Rubin GPU 的另一個綁定輸入。

items.name_zh: NVIDIA GTC 路線圖（Blackwell／Rubin 節奏）
items.what_en: The annual product cadence that resets the ASP ceiling — confirms the timing of each generational step-up.
items.what_zh: 每年重置 ASP 天花板的產品節奏 — 確認每一次世代階躍的時點。

estimates.method_zh: 資料中心營收年化（揭露值，年化）
estimates.basis_en: Unlike AWS, NVIDIA reports a Data Center segment directly. Annualizing the most recent disclosed quarter (~$45B) gives a ~$180B run-rate — and Data Center is now ~88-90% of NVIDIA's total revenue and effectively all AI. Annualization is the only projection; the segment itself is disclosed. Cross-references /payback for the demand-side coverage view.
estimates.basis_zh: 與 AWS 不同，NVIDIA 直接揭露資料中心分部。把最近一季揭露值（約 $45B）年化得到約 $180B 年化營收 — 而資料中心現在約占 NVIDIA 總營收 88-90%、實質上全為 AI。唯一的推估是年化動作；分部本身為揭露值。需求端覆蓋率視角見 /payback。

estimates.method_zh: 資料中心營益（利潤率視角）
estimates.basis_en: At a ~62-64% operating margin on the Data Center run-rate, AI operating income annualizes near $110-115B. This is a derived estimate (NVIDIA reports company-level, not segment-level, operating income) but anchored to disclosed margins.
estimates.basis_zh: 以資料中心年化營收約 62-64% 營益率計，AI 營益年化接近 $110-115B。此為推導估計（NVIDIA 揭露公司層級而非分部層級營益），但錨定在揭露的利潤率上。

estimates.method_zh: 軟體與服務週期性年化
estimates.basis_en: AI Enterprise per-GPU subscriptions, DGX Cloud and Omniverse — management has pointed to a software/services run-rate in the low-single-digit $B and rising. A small slice today, but a higher-margin, value-based layer that compounds.
estimates.basis_zh: AI Enterprise 每 GPU 訂閱、DGX Cloud 與 Omniverse — 管理層指出軟體/服務年化在個位數低端 $B 且持續上升。今日占比小，但屬高利差、價值定向、會複利成長的一層。

benefit.disclosure_note_en: NVIDIA reports Data Center revenue directly (near-pure AI); the only estimates are the operating-income split and the software run-rate. Cross-checked against op-income and software lenses.
benefit.disclosure_note_zh: NVIDIA 直接揭露資料中心營收（近乎純 AI）；唯一的估計是營益拆分與軟體年化。已用營益與軟體視角交叉驗證。

chain.note_en: The volume engine of the current cycle; large-die CoWoS-L + HBM3E make it entirely dependent on TSMC advanced packaging at scale.
chain.note_zh: 本循環的量產引擎；大尺寸 CoWoS-L＋HBM3E 使其在規模上完全依賴台積電先進封裝。

chain.role_zh: 次世代加速器（2026 路線圖）
chain.note_en: Forward roadmap — pushes NVIDIA onto TSMC N3 and the next CoWoS/HBM4 generation, deepening leading-edge dependence.
chain.note_zh: 前瞻路線圖 — 把 NVIDIA 推上台積電 N3 與次世代 CoWoS/HBM4，加深對先進製程的依賴。

chain.role_zh: 上一代訓練/推論加速器
chain.note_en: Still a large installed and shipping base; the generation that established the CoWoS bottleneck as the binding constraint.
chain.note_zh: 仍是龐大的安裝與出貨基礎；正是這一代讓 CoWoS 瓶頸成為綁定約束。

chain.role_zh: 與 GPU 搭配的 Arm CPU（Grace-Blackwell）
chain.note_en: The CPU half of the superchip — another TSMC leading-edge die that ships inside every GB200 rack.
chain.note_zh: 超級晶片的 CPU 一半 — 另一顆每個 GB200 機櫃內都會出貨的台積電先進製程晶粒。

chain.note_en: The fabric that makes NVL72 sell as one system — also TSMC-fabbed, and part of why the unit of sale (and ASP) keeps rising.
chain.note_zh: 讓 NVL72 能以單一系統出售的 fabric — 同樣由台積電製造，也是銷售單位（與 ASP）持續上升的原因之一。

chain.note_en: InfiniBand/Ethernet switches and BlueField DPUs (post-Mellanox) — the networking-attach lever, again on TSMC silicon.
chain.note_zh: InfiniBand／乙太網路交換器與 BlueField DPU（併購 Mellanox 後）— 網路 attach 槓桿，同樣跑在台積電矽上。

silicon.tsmc_read_en: Essentially 100% of NVIDIA's AI silicon — Blackwell/Rubin/Hopper GPUs, the Grace CPU, NVLink switches and networking — is fabbed by TSMC on N4/N3 and packaged with CoWoS. For TSMC, NVIDIA is the direct anchor customer: a top leading-edge buyer AND the single largest source of CoWoS demand. NVIDIA also aggregates the indirect demand of every hyperscaler that rents its GPUs (Amazon is a TSMC customer 'twice over' partly through NVIDIA). The binding constraint on NVIDIA's growth — CoWoS and HBM — sits inside TSMC's own capacity, so NVIDIA's pricing power and TSMC's pricing power are two ends of the same leading-edge scarcity.
silicon.tsmc_read_zh: NVIDIA 的 AI 矽 — Blackwell/Rubin/Hopper GPU、Grace CPU、NVLink 交換器與網路 — 幾乎 100% 由台積電以 N4/N3 製造、用 CoWoS 封裝。對台積電而言，NVIDIA 是直接的頭號客戶：頂級先進製程買家，也是 CoWoS 需求的最大單一來源。NVIDIA 同時匯聚了所有租用其 GPU 的雲端巨頭的間接需求（Amazon 之所以是台積電的「雙重」客戶，部分正是透過 NVIDIA）。NVIDIA 成長的綁定約束 — CoWoS 與 HBM — 就在台積電自己的產能裡，因此 NVIDIA 的定價權與台積電的定價權，是同一個先進製程稀缺的兩端。

proxies.name_zh: 台積電（TSM）— 供給端 proxy
博通（AVGO）— 自研 ASIC 競爭 proxy

alerts.en: Realized-price engine running hot: pricing-power score 75.0/100 — generational ASP step-ups (Hopper→Blackwell→Rubin), rack-scale system selling and CUDA lock-in are doing the work — NVIDIA is a price-maker, not a price-taker.
alerts.zh: 已實現價格引擎火熱：定價權分數 75.0/100 — 世代 ASP 階梯（Hopper→Blackwell→Rubin）、機櫃級整機銷售與 CUDA 鎖定在推動 — NVIDIA 是定價者而非價格接受者。

alerts.en: GPU-scarcity proxy cooling: NVDA -11.83%/m — watch the accelerator-scarcity premium (capacity-block pricing) for follow-through.
alerts.zh: GPU 稀缺 proxy 降溫：NVDA -11.83%/月 — 留意加速器稀缺溢價（capacity-block 定價）是否跟跌。

alerts.en: Concentration: ~100% of the AI compute behind this benefit is TSMC-fabbed, 2 link(s) critical — the CoWoS bottleneck TSMC controls is the binding constraint on growth.
alerts.zh: 集中度：撐起此利益的 AI 算力約 100% 由台積電製造，2 條鏈關鍵 — 台積電掌握的 CoWoS 瓶頸即成長綁定約束。

alerts.en: AI benefit (headline) ≈ $180.0B revenue_runrate — NVIDIA reports Data Center revenue directly (near-pure AI); the only estimates are the operating-income split and the software run-rate. Cross-checked against op-income and software lenses.
alerts.zh: AI 利益（頭條）≈ $180.0B revenue_runrate — NVIDIA 直接揭露資料中心營收（近乎純 AI）；唯一的估計是營益拆分與軟體年化。已用營益與軟體視角交叉驗證。

integrated_thesis.en: NVIDIA is a price-maker running a realized-price engine at 75/100: generational ASP step-ups (Hopper→Blackwell→Rubin), rack-scale selling (GB200 NVL72), and CUDA lock-in let it raise blended price even as per-FLOP list prices fall. That engine converts into a disclosed ~$180B Data Center run-rate (near-pure AI) and an estimated ~$112B operating-income lens. The whole thing is ~100% TSMC-fabbed with two critical links — Blackwell on N4P/CoWoS-L and Rubin on N3/CoWoS-L+HBM4. NVIDIA is our largest and most strategic leading-edge + CoWoS customer; its growth ceiling is the CoWoS/HBM capacity we control.
integrated_thesis.zh: 輝達是定價制定者,實現價格引擎達75/100:世代ASP躍升(Hopper→Blackwell→Rubin)、機櫃級系統銷售(GB200 NVL72)與CUDA鎖定,使其在每FLOP標價下滑時仍能拉高混合價格。此引擎轉化為已揭露約1,800億美元資料中心年化營收(近純AI),營業利益估約1,120億美元。整條鏈近乎100%由台積電代工,兩個關鍵環節:Blackwell走N4P/CoWoS-L、Rubin走N3/CoWoS-L加HBM4。輝達是台積電最大且最具戰略性的先進製程與CoWoS客戶;其成長上限即台積電掌控的CoWoS/HBM產能。

pricing.en: Score 75, verdict RAISING, top lever generational ASP (85). Three T1 levers do the heavy lifting: annual-cadence ASP step-ups, rack-scale system selling (not chips), and CUDA lock-in (80). The scarcity premium (70, T2·est) is the fragile leg — NVDA -11.8%/m flags cooling capacity-block pricing. Networking attach (68) and software (55, est) add blended-price upside but are secondary. This is a genuine price-maker, not a per-unit taker.
pricing.zh: 分數75、判定「提價中」,首要槓桿為世代ASP(85)。三項T1槓桿挑大樑:年度節奏ASP躍升、機櫃級系統銷售(非賣晶片)、CUDA鎖定(80)。稀缺溢價(70,T2估)為脆弱環節——NVDA月跌11.8%預示產能區塊定價降溫。網通附帶(68)與軟體(55,估)提供混合價上行但屬次要。這是真正的定價制定者,非單價接受者。

sources.en: Highest-signal: NVIDIA 10-Q/10-K Data Center segment (the only near-pure AI disclosure) and earnings calls for ASP/mix commentary. Cross-check demand via hyperscaler capex guidance (MSFT/GOOG/META/AMZN). For scarcity, watch GPU spot-rent trackers (vast.ai) and SemiAnalysis accelerator model. For the supply ceiling that matters to us: TSMC CoWoS capacity disclosures, HBM supply (SK hynix/Micron/Samsung), and the GTC Blackwell/Rubin cadence.
sources.zh: 最高訊號源:輝達10-Q/10-K資料中心分部(唯一近純AI揭露)與法說會的ASP/組合說明。需求面交叉驗證看超大規模業者資本支出指引(MSFT/GOOG/META/AMZN)。稀缺性看GPU現貨租金追蹤(vast.ai)與SemiAnalysis加速器模型。對台積電最關鍵的供給上限:台積電CoWoS產能揭露、HBM供給(SK海力士/美光/三星),以及GTC的Blackwell/Rubin節奏。

benefit.en: Headline ~$180B Data Center revenue run-rate is DISCLOSED and annualized — unusually clean, effectively near-pure AI, so little estimation risk on the top line (T1, high confidence). The ~$112B operating-income figure is a margin-lens estimate (T2), and the ~$3B software run-rate is low-confidence (T3). Consensus aligns at $180B. Treat the revenue as fact, the profit split and software as reasoned estimates — not reported line items.
benefit.zh: 頭條約1,800億美元資料中心營收年化為「已揭露」數字,罕見乾淨、近乎純AI,故營收面估計風險極低(T1,高信心)。約1,120億美元營業利益屬利潤率視角之估計(T2);約30億美元軟體年化為低信心(T3)。市場共識同為1,800億。營收視為事實,利潤拆分與軟體僅為推理估計,非申報項目。

silicon.en: ~100% TSMC-fabbed, two critical links. Blackwell (GB200/GB300) sits on N4P + CoWoS-L today; Rubin moves to N3 + advanced CoWoS-L + HBM4 next. Hopper (N4), Grace CPU (N5/N4), NVLink switches and networking (N5/N7) all route to us. For TSMC this is the single largest advanced-node + CoWoS demand vector. The binding constraint is not NVIDIA's design or demand — it is the CoWoS-L and HBM4 co-packaging capacity we allocate.
silicon.zh: 近乎100%台積電代工,兩個關鍵環節。Blackwell(GB200/GB300)現走N4P加CoWoS-L;Rubin接續轉N3加進階CoWoS-L與HBM4。Hopper(N4)、Grace CPU(N5/N4)、NVLink交換器與網通(N5/N7)全部匯入台積電。對台積電而言,這是最大單一先進製程與CoWoS需求來源。約束不在輝達的設計或需求,而在台積電配置的CoWoS-L與HBM4共封裝產能。

tsmc_implication.en: NVIDIA is our #1 direct advanced-node AND CoWoS customer — no indirect-via-others layer here; the exposure is direct and ~100%. The binding constraint is CoWoS-L and HBM4 co-packaging capacity, which we control and which caps NVIDIA's shippable units regardless of its pricing power. Strategic reads: (1) our CoWoS ramp IS NVIDIA's revenue ceiling; (2) Rubin's N3 pull-in tightens our leading-edge loading; (3) if custom-ASIC share (Broadcom -19.6%/m proxy) rises, we still fab those too — so foundry demand is resilient even if NVIDIA's share erodes.
tsmc_implication.zh: 輝達是台積電第一大直接先進製程「及」CoWoS客戶——無經他人間接層,曝險為直接且近乎100%。約束在CoWoS-L與HBM4共封裝產能,由台積電掌控,無論輝達定價力如何皆限制其可出貨量。戰略解讀:(1)台積電CoWoS擴產即輝達營收上限;(2)Rubin的N3提前拉動使先進製程稼動吃緊;(3)若客製ASIC份額上升(博通月跌19.6%為指標),台積電同樣代工之——即便輝達份額流失,代工需求仍具韌性。

scenarios.trigger_en: Rubin ships on schedule, Data Center run-rate clears $250B, gross margin holds above 72%.
scenarios.trigger_zh: Rubin如期出貨,資料中心年化營收突破2,500億美元,毛利率維持72%以上。

scenarios.trigger_en: NVIDIA guides supply-constrained; shipped units stay below demand as CoWoS-L / HBM4 allocation binds.
scenarios.trigger_zh: 輝達指引供給受限;CoWoS-L/HBM4配置緊縮使出貨量低於需求。

scenarios.name_zh: 系統與軟體重新定價勝出
scenarios.trigger_en: Per-GPU ASP plateaus but rack-system + networking attach lift blended realized price; software run-rate >$5B.
scenarios.trigger_zh: 每GPU ASP持平,但機櫃系統加網通附帶拉升混合實現價;軟體年化營收超50億美元。

scenarios.trigger_en: Hyperscaler capex flattens YoY, GPU spot rents fall hard, custom ASICs take share; scarcity premium compresses.
scenarios.trigger_zh: 超大規模資本支出年增持平,GPU現貨租金重挫,客製ASIC搶佔份額;稀缺溢價收斂。

falsification.en: Data Center gross margin falls below ~70% for two consecutive quarters — signals ASP/mix and scarcity premium eroding faster than volume compensates.
falsification.zh: 資料中心毛利率連兩季跌破約70%——顯示ASP/組合與稀缺溢價侵蝕快於出貨量補償。

falsification.en: GPU spot rents (vast.ai) fall >40% while hyperscaler capex guidance flattens YoY — breaks the scarcity/allocation-premium leg.
falsification.zh: GPU現貨租金(vast.ai)跌逾40%且超大規模資本支出年增持平——瓦解稀缺/配置溢價環節。

falsification.en: Custom-ASIC (Trainium/TPU/MTIA/Maia) share of hyperscaler training capex crosses ~30%, capping NVIDIA's rack-system pricing power.
falsification.zh: 客製ASIC(Trainium/TPU/MTIA/Maia)佔超大規模訓練資本支出份額突破約30%,壓制輝達機櫃系統定價力。

watch.en: GPU spot-rent trackers (vast.ai) for scarcity-premium follow-through after NVDA -11.8%/m.
watch.zh: GPU現貨租金追蹤(vast.ai),觀察NVDA月跌11.8%後稀缺溢價後續。

watch.en: Hyperscaler capex guidance (MSFT/GOOG/META/AMZN) — earliest demand signal.
watch.zh: 超大規模業者資本支出指引(MSFT/GOOG/META/AMZN)——最早的需求訊號。

watch.en: TSMC CoWoS-L capacity & HBM4 supply (SK hynix/Micron) — the binding volume constraint.
watch.zh: 台積電CoWoS-L產能與HBM4供給(SK海力士/美光)——出貨量的約束環節。

watch.en: NVIDIA Data Center revenue & gross margin (10-Q / earnings call).
watch.zh: 輝達資料中心營收與毛利率(10-Q/法說會)。

watch.en: GTC roadmap — Rubin N3 cadence and pull-in timing affecting our leading-edge loading.
watch.zh: GTC路線圖——Rubin N3節奏與提前拉貨時點,影響先進製程稼動。

watch.en: Broadcom / custom-ASIC momentum (AVGO -19.6%/m proxy) for share-shift signals.
watch.zh: 博通/客製ASIC動能(AVGO月跌19.6%指標),觀察份額移轉訊號。

watch.en: NVIDIA software & DGX Cloud run-rate disclosures for repricing-path evidence.
watch.zh: 輝達軟體與DGX Cloud年化營收揭露,佐證重新定價路徑。

cross_links.label_en: CapEx → Wafer Engine — turn the capex NVIDIA captures into implied TSMC wafer demand
cross_links.label_zh: CapEx → 晶圓引擎 — 把 NVIDIA 吃下的 capex 換算成隱含台積電晶圓需求

cross_links.label_en: Pricing Power Radar — the foundry ASP side of the same price stack
cross_links.label_zh: 議價能力雷達 — 同一價格堆疊的代工 ASP 端

cross_links.label_en: Capex Payback Radar — is the AI capex NVIDIA feeds on paying off yet?
cross_links.label_zh: 資本支出回本雷達 — 餵養 NVIDIA 的 AI capex 回本了沒？

cross_links.label_en: AI Compute Demand Radar — the accelerator demand NVIDIA supplies
cross_links.label_zh: AI 算力需求雷達 — NVIDIA 供給的加速器需求

cross_links.label_en: Rival Radar — TSMC's competitive position behind NVIDIA's silicon
cross_links.label_zh: 競爭者雷達 — NVIDIA 矽背後台積電的競爭格局

blind_spots_en: NVIDIA discloses Data Center revenue but not a precise training-vs-inference-vs-networking split — that breakdown here is estimated, and the run-rate annualizes a single quarter.
Node and packaging assignments (e.g. Rubin on N3, CoWoS-L) are from press / industry reporting, not TSMC/NVIDIA confirmation.
Live proxies (NVDA/TSM/AVGO equity) are sentiment context, deliberately kept out of the core pricing-power score.
blind_spots_zh: NVIDIA 揭露資料中心營收，但未揭露精確的訓練 vs 推論 vs 網路拆分 — 此處的拆分為估計，且年化是把單季年化。
節點與封裝對應（如 Rubin 用 N3、CoWoS-L）來自媒體／產業報導，非台積電/NVIDIA 確認。
即時 proxy（NVDA/TSM/AVGO 股價）為情緒情境，刻意排除在核心定價權分數之外。
